steps.title: Recognize the overview task
steps.content: The goal is to provide an overview of the NWR program—a broad, general statement about the program, not specific details about individual refuges.

steps.title: Identify the program-level statement
steps.content:
Choice A synthesizes the scale (500+ refuges), purpose (protecting endangered species), and geographic reach (coast to coast) into a single statement about the program.
B, C, and D focus on individual refuges or their specific characteristics.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
